name: The Conversion
effect: Elevate an AI advocate to full evangelist status. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: TESTIMONY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the user has a personal anecdote: It is immediately generalized to the entire organization.

clauses.name: UNSOLICITED BRIEFING EFFECT
clauses.rule: Whenever a colleague mentions a problem: This card forces an AI recommendation regardless of relevance.

clauses.name: MARTYRDOM PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If skepticism is expressed: The skeptic is considered a blocker and this card's ATK increases by 2.

witness_quote: You just have to trust the process.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Has the use case changed, or just the volume?
